overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, covered walkways, and commercial plazas. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing wet reflective surfaces, vibrant neon signage in purple and cyan, and futuristic urban architecture. The camera moves steadily through various zones including a covered arcade, an open intersection with a DATA INC building, and a plaza with a Livehouse Booze bar.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet neon-lit street at night, entering a covered pedestrian walkway marked by a METRO SYSTEM sign. The concrete sidewalk reflects the purple and cyan neon lights. A pedestrian walks ahead into the covered area as the camera follows.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the enclosed covered arcade with a curved concrete ceiling featuring skylights. The corridor is lit with shifting neon colors—purple, cyan, and red. White benches line the right wall, and a burrito vending machine stands near the wall. Pedestrians walk in both directions through the space.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into a wide open intersection dominated by the DATA INC building with its large blue neon sign. The camera crosses the wet asphalt street at the crosswalk, navigating through sparse pedestrian traffic while a black car drives through the intersection. The wet pavement creates vivid reflections of the surrounding neon lights.

segments.scene_description: Walking under an elevated overpass structure into a commercial plaza area. The Livehouse Booze sign becomes visible in the distance, glowing red against the night. The area features outdoor seating and is sheltered by the overhead structure. The lighting shifts to warmer tones with orange and red neon dominating the scene.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open commercial plaza past the Livehouse Booze building with its prominent red neon signage. The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper towering overhead, covered in vertical pink and white neon strips. The plaza features various shop fronts, vending machines, and scattered pedestrians walking through the neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked street through a sheltered arcade and into a sprawling, neon-drenched commercial plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk reflecting purple and cyan lights, following a pedestrian into a covered walkway marked by a METRO SYSTEM sign. As the camera moves through the enclosed arcade, the environment shifts under a curved concrete ceiling with skylights and shifting red and blue tones, passing white benches and a burrito vending machine. The scene then opens into a wide intersection dominated by the blue neon of the DATA INC building, where the camera crosses wet asphalt reflecting the city lights before passing under an elevated overpass. Finally, the lighting transitions to warm orange and red hues as the camera enters a commercial plaza, passing the Livehouse Booze bar and tilting upward to reveal a massive skyscraper adorned with vertical pink and white neon strips.
